email-fwdr-verification.loading.title: Verifying Email
email-fwdr-verification.success.title: Your email address is now verified.
email-fwdr-verification.success.nextStep: To complete setup of the Email Routing, go to the Email Routing page.
Once setup is complete, email can be directed to %{email}.
email-fwdr-verification.invalid.title: Oops! This link isn't valid.
email-fwdr-verification.invalid.text: Go to the Email Forwarding page to resend a verification email.
email-fwdr-verification.error.title: Oops! Something went wrong.
email-fwdr-verification.error.text: Refresh this page to try again. If the issue persists, contact customer support
